_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of Mosaicism and Detection of Cryptic Alleles in CRISPR/Cas9-Engineered Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and

_contextSnippet: In addition to the more fundamental phenotypes such as café au lait spots and neurofibromas, our NF1 models show considerable diversity and complexity of phenotypes similar to those often observed in human patients.
details: Successfully generated multiple NF1 pig models including E19* early truncation, 23kb excision, and a31 excision variants, with phenotypes similar to human NF1 patients including café au lait spots and neurofibromas
